description: Fix region diorama: (1) Front row at bottom, (2) Full-bleed background without darkening overlay, (3) Province name with border text shadow and region color, (4) Replace FistIcon with shield+star design.
steps: Fix row positioning so front row is always at bottom, mid in middle, back at top regardless of empty rows
Move background image to cover the entire modal including header, remove dark overlay
Style province name with black text-stroke shadow and PROVINCE_COLORS color
Replace FistIcon SVG with shield+star design
acceptance_criteria: Front row renders at the bottom of the diorama area
Background image covers entire modal window including header area with no gaps
Province name uses PROVINCE_COLORS for text color and has black text-shadow border
FistIcon renders as a shield with star design
npx vite build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx vite build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0 with no errors
findings: All 4 fixes implemented: (1) All 3 layer divs always render (even empty) with flex layout using justify-content:flex-end so front row is always at bottom, (2) Background image moved to .region-diorama-modal itself with no padding and no dark overlay, (3) Province name uses PROVINCE_COLORS[regionId] for color with black text-stroke shadow, (4) FistIcon replaced with shield+star SVG design. Vite build passes cleanly.
